mapper.insert: insert into source_file_chunks ( source_file_id, file_path, chunk_index, chunk_text, is_verbatim, file_path_norm, search_tsv ) values ( #{record.sourceFileId}, #{record.filePath}, #{record.chunkIndex}, #{record.chunkText}, #{record.verbatim}, #{filePathNorm}, to_tsvector('simple'::regconfig, #{searchText}) )
mapper.select: select source_file_id, file_path, chunk_index, chunk_text, is_verbatim from source_file_chunks order by file_path, chunk_index

select null::bigint as source_id, concat(sfc.file_path, '#', sfc.chunk_index) as item_key, sfc.file_path as concept_id, sfc.file_path as title, sfc.chunk_text as content, concat( '{"filePath":"', replace(coalesce(sfc.file_path, ''), '"', '\"'), '","chunkIndex":', sfc.chunk_index, ',"verbatim":', sfc.is_verbatim, '}' ) as metadata_json, array[sfc.file_path]::text[] as source_paths, sfc.chunk_index, sfc.is_verbatim as verbatim, (1.0 / (1 + abs(sfc.chunk_index - #{chunkIndex}))) as score from source_file_chunks sfc where sfc.file_path = #{filePath} and sfc.chunk_index between #{startIndex} and #{endIndex} and sfc.chunk_index <> #{chunkIndex} order by abs(sfc.chunk_index - #{chunkIndex}), sfc.chunk_index asc limit #{limit}
